meaning: n.蜊丞勧,謠ｴ蜉ｩ,陦･蜉ｩ,<闍ｱ>蝗ｽ螳ｶ陦･蜉ｩ
examples: Can I be of any assistance?
They rendered assistance to the disaster victims.
Despite his cries, no one came to his assistance.
The Tragedy Assistance Program for Survivors (TAPS) helps care for the victims' families.
So in October 2002 Gail hired Kent Edwards, president of Medical Claim Assistance in Oklahoma City.
